title: Easy As Pie
description: A mod that adds tea and coffee plants and some drinks with useful effects
body:
A mod that adds teas and coffees with useful effects, as well as tea and coffee plants.

List of tea types:
- Cherry Tea – Regeneration I and Health Boost II
- Azalea Tea – Absorption II
- Qiang Tea – Dolphin's Grace II
- Red Tea – Regeneration II
- Green Tea – Jump Boost II
- Puerh Tea – Resistance II

List of coffee types:
- Black Coffee – Relieves Fatigue or gives Haste III
- Cherry Coffee – Relieves Poison or gives Regeneration II
- Azalea Coffee – Relieves Wither or gives Health Boost I
- Coffee with Milk – Relieves Fatigue or gives Health Boost I
- Golden Black Coffee – Health Boost III and Resistance III
